_meta.source: Hand-curated mapping over union of public.everest_tenants.skill_allowlist (29 distinct slugs at generation). NO dedicated everest_skills table exists in Supabase as of 2026-05-06; the canonical skill list is the union of skill_allowlist arrays across all tenants.
_meta.purpose: Skill-catalog hints exposed in ClaudeTerminal's F1 panel. Each command references $EVEREST_TENANT and $EVEREST_DOMAIN env vars set by the tenant profile (see seeds/everest-tenants.json).
_meta.refresh: When skill_allowlist changes in everest_tenants, update the categories below to match. Run cargo build --release to re-embed.

hints.title: Programmatic SEO
hints.command: Generate programmatic SEO plan for $EVEREST_TENANT on $EVEREST_DOMAIN

hints.title: SEO Audit
hints.description: Find gaps in titles, headings, schema, internal links

hints.title: AI Search Optimization
hints.command: Optimize $EVEREST_DOMAIN for AI search and LLM citation

hints.title: Popup CRO
hints.command: Design popup with conversion lift for $EVEREST_TENANT

hints.title: Signup Flow
hints.description: Step reduction, magic link vs password

hints.title: Lead Magnet
hints.description: Free resource calibrated to ICP pain

hints.title: Free Tool
hints.command: Spec a free tool as TOFU magnet for $EVEREST_TENANT

hints.title: Copy Editing
hints.command: Edit copy for $EVEREST_TENANT for clarity and conversion

hints.command: Generate week of social content for $EVEREST_TENANT

hints.command: Write cold email sequence for $EVEREST_TENANT ICP

hints.command: Set up analytics and event tracking for $EVEREST_TENANT
